differential_diagnoses: Septic shock from occult gram-negative source
next_steps: Send comprehensive infectious panel including Dengue/Chikungunya PCR, Leptospirosis PCR/serology, and repeating malaria smears
Order laboratory workup for HLH: ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble IL-2 receptor
Maintain broad-spectrum antibiotic coverage (add doxycycline for empiric coverage of Leptospirosis/rickettsial disease)
Obtain cardiology consultation for persistent global biventricular hypokinesis and review of electrocardiographic changes
Monitor hematologic trends (hemoconcentration followed by potential drop) to assess degree of capillary leak
Delay invasive procedures like lumbar puncture until hemodynamically stable and coagulopathy is corrected
